name: MegumaGold Corp.
summary: MegumaGold Corp., an exploration stage company, acquires, explores for, and develops natural resource properties in Canada. Its principal property is the Meguma gold project, which covers an area of approximately 107,114 hectares located in Nova Scotia. The company was formerly known as Coronet Metals Inc. and changed its name to MegumaGold Corp. in June 2018. MegumaGold Corp. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
